name: John Moolenaar
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $207,981 for John Moolenaar in U.S. House, MI-02. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
